description: 5. Get the reputation of an email observable: email
examples:
Command Example
email email=disco-team@stealthemail.com
Context Example
{
"EclecticIQ.Email": [
{
"Maliciousness": "unknown",
"Created": "2018-11-21T13:34:31.126027+00:00",
name: email

outputs.description: Email that was tested EclecticIQ.Email.Created Date
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Email.Address

outputs.description: EclecticIQ.Email.LastUpdate Date Observable last updated date
outputs.name: Observable creation date

outputs.description: Observable ID EclecticIQ.Email.Maliciousness Maliciousness confidence level
outputs.name: EclecticIQ.Email.ID

outputs.description: Email that was tested Account.Email.Malcious.Vendor For malicious email addresses, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: Account.Email.Address

outputs.description: For malicious email addresses, the reason that the vendor made the decision DBotScore.Type Indicator type
outputs.name: Account.Email.Malcious.Description

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
